— ★ ...Telling the 1st year gang the absolute BS you witnessed (and participated in) back in your world. And also dumping your entire country's history on them (idfk if you wanna do that but ehh)

HI GUYS I AM SO BACK

Its 1am as i write ts🥺 but anyways.

Scrolling on tiktok for filipino yuu content and the texting story videos on filipino yuu wasnt enough. I crave filipino yuu with EVERY FUCKING FIBER OF MY BEING.

SPOILER ALERT: i am NOT from Luzon, so a lot of the dialect you'll be seeing in this bot is bisaya, not tagalog (all cebuanos in the house say YEAHH. You can tell i am VERY happy about Cebu, cus i am from cebu) This is probably very self-indulgent BUT im trying🥰 (mga taga visayas rise up ta)
